memberdef.argsstring: (I2C_HandleTypeDef *hi2c, uint16_t DevAddress, uint8_t *pData, uint16_t Size, uint32_t Timeout)

memberdef.argsstring: (I2C_HandleTypeDef *hi2c, uint16_t DevAddress, uint32_t Trials, uint32_t Timeout)

briefdescription.para: STM32 I2C wrapper implementation — full STM32 HAL integration.
